final-capstone-file-room-handoff.label: Capstone: Remiz Sal Fichye a
final-capstone-file-room-handoff.summary: Sèvi ak tèminal Linux pou transfòme yon espas travay evènman dezòdone an yon remiz pwòp: enspekte sa ki la, klase fichye yo nan dosye ki kòrèk yo, pwoteje yon nòt enpòtan ak yon kopi sekirite, retire dezòd tanporè, epi kite yon makè klè ki montre li pare.

sketch0.title: Rezime sou remiz kle Sal Dosye Kominotè a

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Fè yon envantè bwat resepsyon chanm dosye a
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Ou ap kòmanse remiz final evènman an e ou bezwen yon anrejistreman rapid sou sa ki rive. Tcheke bwat resepsyon an, epi kreye yon evènman "`community-file-room/handoff/inventory.txt`" pou make ke revizyon admisyon an te fèt.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kumulatif. Kòmanse nan espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman ki mande a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè yo konekte. Konsève livrabl ki te fèt deja yo epi ajoute yon nouvo travay itil.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak ls oswa find pou tcheke espas travay aktyèl la anvan ou chanje li.
help.hint_2: Pa efase fichye ki soti nan etap anvan yo, sof si mesaj la mande w klèman pou w netwaye yon fichye tanporè.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

0.message: Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Klase nòt sou ajanda a, envite yo, ak lokal la.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Bwat resepsyon an toujou gen fichye evènman ki pa òganize. Kreye dosye "`community-file-room/agenda`", "`community-file-room/guests`", ak "`community-file-room/venue`", epi deplase "`agenda.txt`", "`guest-list.txt`", ak "`venue.txt`" soti nan "`community-file-room/inbox`" pou mete yo nan dosye ki koresponn yo.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kumulatif. Kòmanse nan espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman ki mande a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè yo konekte. Konsève livrabl ki te fèt deja epi ajoute yon nouvo travay itil.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak ls oswa find pou tcheke espas travay aktyèl la anvan ou chanje li.
help.hint_2: Pa efase fichye ki soti nan etap anvan yo, sof si mesaj la mande w klèman pou w efase yon fichye tanporè.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux project step.

0.message: Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Sipòte ajanda a
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Anvan nenpòt moun netwaye espas travay la, sove yon kopi ajanda a. Kopye `community-file-room/agenda/agenda.txt` pou `community-file-room/backups/agenda.txt`.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kumulatif. Kòmanse nan espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman ki mande a.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Kreye yon rezime revizyon
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Pwochen volontè a bezwen yon ti nòt revizyon apre ou fin verifye ajanda a ak lis envite yo. Kreye "`community-file-room/handoff/review-summary.txt`" kòm fichye rezime a.
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kumulatif. Kòmanse nan espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman ki mande a.

final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.title: Netwaye dezòd tanporè epi make pare
final-capstone-file-room-handoff-termina.prompt: Konplete remiz evènman an lè w retire fichye pwovizwa a ki nan bwat resepsyon an epi kreye yon dosye "`community-file-room/handoff/READY.txt`" pou espas travay la montre klèman ke li pare.

community_file_room_handoff_review_summa.content: Agenda and guest list reviewed for handoff

capstone-synopsis.title: Remiz Sal Fichye Kominotè
capstone-synopsis.bodyMarkdown:
Ou se dènye moun k ap ede nan chanm dosye a pou yon evènman kominotè. Enspekte bwat resepsyon an, triye dosye enpòtan yo, fè yon kopi sekirite ajanda a, revize remiz la, retire dezòd tanporè yo, epi kite yon makè ki pare.

W ap konplete sa kòm etap pwojè ki konekte yo. Chak etap kòmanse apati espas travay anvan an, kidonk pa efase livrabl ki te fèt anvan yo.
